chat_messages.text: How should I organize my Obsidian vault?

I recommend a flat folder structure with three main directories: notes/ for permanent notes, sources/ for reference material, and mocs/ for Maps of Content. Let links create the structure rather than folders.
Use tags for broad categories (e.g., #productivity, #coding) and links for specific connections between ideas. Tags help with filtering while links create meaningful relationships.
Common patterns include: pipeline (sequential stages), fan-out/fan-in (parallel processing), and orchestrator-worker (central coordinator with specialized workers).
